title: T-024 — Yield variance per WO computation + waste cost handler (§9.5, §11.5 V-FIN-WO-03/V-FIN-VAR-*, §13.3)
prompt:
# T-024 — Yield variance + waste cost handler

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §9.5 waste cost allocation (Q4 decision); §11.3 V-FIN-WO-03 yield ±10% warn; §11.5 V-FIN-VAR-04 yield+material both negative info; §13.1 waste.logged + wo_output.registered handlers; §13.3 yield_loss monthly aggregation view.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Two worker handlers + one SQL view:
1. `handle_waste_logged(event)`: evaluate waste_cost_allocator_v1 (T-022) → compute waste_cost_line; UPDATE work_order_costs.waste_cost_actual += amount; insert cost_variances if threshold breached.
2. `handle_wo_output(event)`: compute yield_variance_pct = (qty_actual - qty_standard) / qty_standard × 100; if abs > 10% emit V-FIN-WO-03 warn; if also material variance < 0 emit V-FIN-VAR-04 info flag for cross-check; INSERT cost_variances row category='yield'.
3. SQL view `v_yield_loss_monthly` per §13.3 SQL — joins ncr_reports (09-QA, type='yield_issue') with items + exchange_rates for GBP conversion.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/worker/src/finance/waste-logged-handler.ts`:
   - Read event {org_id, wo_id, item_id, category_id, qty_kg, idempotency_key}.
   - Evaluate waste_cost_allocator_v1 (T-022) → returns {waste_cost, strategy} where strategy in (full_loss, partial_recovery=P2 stub, sell_scrap=P2 stub).
   - UPDATE work_order_costs SET waste_cost_actual = waste_cost_actual + computed_amount WHERE wo_id=$1 (SELECT FOR UPDATE).
   - If waste_cost > threshold (configurable per finance_settings.ext_jsonb 'waste_alert_threshold_gbp' default 100), insert cost_variances row category='waste'.
2. `apps/worker/src/finance/wo-output-handler.ts`:
   - Read event {org_id, wo_id, item_id, qty_kg, output_type, idempotency_key}.
   - SELECT work_order_costs WHERE wo_id; compute yield_variance_pct (note: yield_variance_pct is GENERATED in the schema but we must update qty_produced_actual to feed it; do that here).
   - UPDATE work_order_costs SET qty_produced_actual = qty_produced_actual + qty_kg WHERE wo_id=$1.
   - INSERT cost_variances (category='yield', variance_amount = (qty_actual - qty_standard) × unit_cost_standard, variance_pct = computed).
   - V-FIN-WO-03 warn: if abs(yield_variance_pct) > 10, write audit_events 'yield_variance_high'.
   - V-FIN-VAR-04 info: if yield_variance_pct < 0 AND material_variance < 0, write audit 'yield_material_substitution_suspect'.
   - Call T-017 allocate_coproducts(wo_id) after registering output (per §13.1 row 'wo_output.registered').
3. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0060_yield_loss_view.sql`:
   - `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_yield_loss_monthly` with the §13.3 query verbatim — joining ncr_reports (09-QA cross-module, type='yield_issue') + items + exchange_rates. Security: SECURITY INVOKER + uses RLS of underlying tables.
4. Worker registration subscribes to `production.waste.logged` + `production.wo_output.registered`.

## Files
- apps/worker/src/finance/waste-logged-handler.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/wo-output-handler.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/registry.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/0060_yield_loss_view.sql [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/waste-logged-handler.test.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/wo-output-handler.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given waste.logged event qty_kg=5 + category full_loss + item cost_per_kg=4, when handler runs, then wo_costs.waste_cost_actual += 20 and cost_variances row category='waste' exists.
- Given wo_output.registered qty_kg=80 with qty_produced_standard=100, when handler runs, then qty_produced_actual=80, yield_variance_pct=-20.0, cost_variances category='yield' row with variance_pct=-20. AND given yield_variance_pct=-20 (abs > 10), when handler runs, then audit 'yield_variance_high'. AND given yield_variance_pct < 0 AND material_variance < 0, when handler runs, then audit 'yield_material_substitution_suspect'.
- Given handler calls allocate_coproducts, when commit, then output_attribution_item_id populated on cons_costs rows. AND given v_yield_loss_monthly queried for a period, when results returned, then groups by month+product, sums qty_kg + GBP-converted cost.
- Given event consumed twice, when second invocation runs, then no UPDATE (idempotent).
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: seed wo_outputs + waste_log + ncr_reports (cross-module mock); assert each AC.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run finance/waste-logged-handler finance/wo-output-handler && pnpm --filter db migrate`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip SELECT FOR UPDATE on work_order_costs (concurrent consume + output + waste race).
- Do not double-count waste when allocate_coproducts also writes attribution rows.
- Do not include retention_until-expired rows in the yield_loss view (filter retention_until > current_date).
- Do not query 09-QA ncr_reports without org_id filter (multi-tenant correctness).
- Do not use FLOAT.
- Do not bypass V-FIN-WO-03 warn audit.
- Do not handle synchronously in Server Action.

pipeline_inputs.description: Waste cost handler (full_loss strategy P1) + WO output handler (yield variance compute) + monthly yield loss view joining 09-QA ncr_reports.
pipeline_inputs.details: Implements §9.5 full_loss P1; recovery_value credit (partial_recovery / sell_scrap) deferred to P2 EPIC 10-K. wo_output handler chains into T-017 allocate_coproducts. View v_yield_loss_monthly is SECURITY INVOKER (respects underlying RLS). [AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]
